panel.sessionNotesText: Keep this panel expanded for layout actions, background, and theme tools. Collapse it when you want a cleaner editing surface.

actions.imageOrVideoUrl: Image or video URL. Applied and panel will close.

marketingSafePreview.label: Blueprint preview
marketingSafePreview.description: Shows a blueprint-style layout instead of the default preview. Editing and your data stay the same.
marketingSafePreview.enabledHint: Blueprint preview is active — turn it off in the engine panel anytime.

blueprint.dimWorkshop: Card height 400 px · column width = (inner row − gaps) ÷ item count
blueprint.dimCurated: Frame gap 10 px · image scales to inner box
blueprint.dimGuide: Main column 632 px · record area 160×160 px
blueprint.dimAdd: No fixed export size · matches edit panel
blueprint.exportGuideNoRoot: Open the profile preview so the layout registers, then try again.

tutorial.autoTracking: Steps are tracked and completed automatically

autoDescriptions.step1: Click "Edit" at the top to enter edit mode; this step completes automatically.
autoDescriptions.step2: Add or rearrange showcases in edit mode to complete this step.
autoDescriptions.step3: Change background or theme here (including custom URLs); this step completes after a change.
autoDescriptions.step4: Open the Artwork page and use its tools to complete this step.

hints.step1: Hint: click "Edit" at the top to start designing your profile.
hints.step2: Hint: in edit mode, add badge, artwork, or custom showcases.
hints.step3: Hint: change background or theme from here.
hints.step4: Hint: open Artwork in the left nav for Video-to-GIF and more.

newProjectConfirm.label: Confirm Action
newProjectConfirm.title: Start new desktop project?
newProjectConfirm.description: Your current unsaved changes will be cleared. This action cannot be undone.
